title: lycopersicon peruvianum subsp. dentatum
intro: Lycopersicon peruvianum subsp. dentatum, also known as the wild tomato or mountain tomato, is a species of wild tomato native to Peru and the Andean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lycopersicon peruvianum subsp. dentatum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
